title: Sprightly
description: A smooth vanilla+ texture pack with a soft, toony aesthetic.
body:
![Sprightly Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f87c2b5d704ba5e85aca09c086208796d1ec1e.png)


A smooth vanilla+ texture pack with a soft, toony aesthetic.


Sprightly is a smooth texture pack, made with love and a toony approach.
Sprightly gets rid of any "sharp", noisy textures, and makes Minecraft feel fresh, calm, and more lively. (This doesn't mean it isn't suitable for something like PvP)



Small (not all) feature description:
A smooth, clean dark-mode GUI theme (still in progress)
Less obstructive item visuals (e.g., lowered shields)
Fresh textures that blend seamlessly with vanilla and other packs
Mod support (e.g., AppleSkin integration)

And of course, much more, and much more to come!


All official sprightly "addons/packs":

Sprightly,

Sprightly (only the gui),

Sprightly (Font addon)


This pack is still in early development, with more content and refinements coming over time, so do not expect a full overhaul just yet, but it is still a great pack that integrates very well, even with vanilla Minecraft or other texture packs!


Join the Discord to give support or feedback, or to be part of the community. I’m happy to help with anything.


Inspired by other packs like: "Whimscape", "Resprited", "Mandalas dark mode", "Bare bones", and many more amazing texture packs. (even some shaders)
